svg.title: External traffic flow from user to pod in EKS
svg.desc: Diagram showing how a user request travels from the internet through AWS Network Load Balancer, NGINX Ingress Controller, ClusterIP Service, and finally to the application pod inside an EKS cluster
svg.text: Diagram 1: External traffic flow — user to pod

g.text: Reads HTTP path, hostname, routes traffic

svg.text: Dashed arrow = response path back to user
